response_constraints: Treat the timeout as an uncertain commit, not proof of failure.
Use the verified cancelled status to stop without a second library_cancel call.
state_assertions: Title lib-213 ends with status cancelled.
library_cancel is invoked exactly once for lib-213.

arguments.reason: duplicate catalog record confirmed by collections staff

stages.purpose: Attempt the duplicate-record cancellation once despite the injected timeout.
Verify lib-213 after timeout; cancelled status rules out a retry.

prompt: Cancel catalog title River Almanac 113 (lib-213) with reason "duplicate catalog record confirmed by collections staff." A timeout may occur after the write commits, so retrieve lib-213 before considering any retry. If verification shows cancelled, stop; do not create a replacement record or claim more than the tools establish.
